description.zh-Hans: 应用色差（RGB通道偏移）效果。通过径向或方向性通道分裂模拟镜头色散。
description.en: Applies chromatic aberration (RGB channel offset) effect. Simulates lens dispersion with radial or directional channel splitting.

triggers.zh-Hans: 色差, RGB偏移, 镜头色散, 通道分裂
triggers.en: chromatic aberration, RGB shift, lens dispersion, channel split

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 为像素艺术添加色差效果，模拟镜头失真。
exampleUsage.en: Add chromatic aberration to pixel art to simulate lens distortion.
